title: Sony plans to eliminate physical PlayStation discs by 2028, generating criticism and petitions
summary: The transition to a digital ecosystem has caused controversy, with politicians and experts questioning the decision and players organizing a petition.

title: Bandai Namco confirms the future of Dragon Ball Xenoverse and the last DLC for Xenoverse 2 in July
summary: The company announces new content for the Xenoverse series, including the final chapter of 'Future Saga' which will be released on July 8th.

title: Specialized media share their gaming experiences of the week
summary: Nintendo Life, Rock Paper Shotgun, and Eurogamer publish their weekly columns about the games their writers are playing.

title: Cyberpunk 2077 reaches 40 million copies sold
summary: CD Projekt Red's RPG surpasses a new sales milestone, consolidating its success after the game's improvement.

title: Spike Chunsoft delays Danganronpa 2×2 until early 2027
summary: The game is delayed to include new features such as 'Slayhem' mode and an improved world map.

title: Sandfall studio does not fear criticism and plans to take risks after Expedition 33
summary: The studio director states that they are not worried about the reception of their next game and that they will follow a creative approach.

title: Valve's Steam Machines suffer from 'Red Line of Death' error
summary: Some units present a critical failure similar to that of the Xbox 360, and Valve has warned users about the problem.

title: Cyberpunk Edgerunners 2 offers devastation in Night City according to early impressions
summary: The early preview of the anime sequel shows a dark and chaotic tone in the city.

title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle releases on streaming in July 2026
summary: The release date on digital platforms for the next film in the franchise is revealed.

title: Epic Games settles lawsuit against former employee who leaked Fortnite information
summary: The legal agreement ends the case of the contractor who had revealed details of the game.

title: EVE Online studio makes the source code of its game engine public
summary: Fenris keeps its long-standing promise and releases the Carbon engine as free software.

title: The new update for The Sims 4 reduces notifications and allows silencing the phone
summary: Players can now disable annoying calls and the Reaper will appear less frequently.

title: A player manages to buy GTA 6 for only 2 dollars thanks to a gift card error
summary: A mistake on a Best Buy card allowed an almost total discount on the game.

title: Paradox will delete inactive accounts starting next year
summary: The company warns that accounts that have not logged in for a while will be deleted.

title: Google loses antitrust trial and faces record fine of 4.1 billion euros
summary: The European ruling imposes a historic sanction on the company, although it represents a small percentage of its revenue.

title: Intel discreetly raises the price of its best processors
summary: The company justifies the increase due to current market dynamics.

title: Yoshitaka Amano returns to traditional animation with the ZAN project
summary: The artist behind Final Fantasy embarks on a new hand-drawn anime.

title: John Romero corrects Sandy Petersen's claims about the history of Doom
summary: The co-creator of the game clarifies details and contradicts some recent statements.

title: Capcom seeks to broaden Mega Man's audience
summary: The company expresses its intention to make the franchise more accessible without losing its essence.

title: The studio //18.bravo bets on a radically different approach to game development
summary: The new team of developers seeks to innovate in the methodology of video game creation.
